title: Test end-to-end automated external-data ingestion (EPI + WGI through bronze to gold, no manual upload)
description: Run the full pipeline and verify EPI and WGI data flows through bronze -> silver -> gold without any manual file upload, confirming the external-data automation described in external_data_automation.md actually holds end to end. Originally tracked as inline subtask task-005-4 inside task-005, which was marked Finished while this item was still Pending — promoted to a standalone task by /health-check 2026-07-19 so it is visible to routing.
acceptanceCriteria: A full pipeline run completes with zero manual file uploads for EPI and WGI.
bronze_EPI and bronze_WGI populate from the automated ingestion notebooks, and the corresponding silver/gold tables reflect the fresh data.
Row counts and a spot-check of values are recorded in the task notes as the baseline for future runs.
notes: PROMOTED by /health-check 2026-07-19 from task-005's legacy inline subtask array (id was task-005-4). task-005 remains Finished — this was the human-owned verification tail.
DEPENDS ON task-035 (pipeline repointed to TridentNotebook activities) — testing automated ingestion before the pipeline actually calls the notebooks would only re-confirm the manual path.

STALENESS CHECK: authored 2026-01; the WGI lineage in particular has changed (API-based bronze_WGI replaced the CSV/dataflow shape, and task-031 covers governance-score preservation). Verify the expected end state against current docs before treating a run as a pass.
